claim: The Pauli matrices satisfy [sigma_x, sigma_y] = 2 i sigma_z.
success_criteria: Defines Pauli matrices explicitly or via QuTiP.
Computes the commutator sigma_x sigma_y - sigma_y sigma_x.
Shows the residual against 2 i sigma_z is zero.
failure_modes: Gets the sign convention wrong without explaining it.
prompt: Validate the Pauli commutator identity [sigma_x, sigma_y] = 2 i sigma_z by computing the matrix residual.
